description: Add adjustable completion date picker and decorative dashboard animations (clock widget, floating shapes, rotating quotes).
steps: Modify the markCompleted function in app.js to show a date picker instead of immediately marking done with today's date
Update the scheduleRevision logic to use the selected date instead of today when scheduling first revision
Add an animated clock widget to the dashboard showing current time with a ticking second hand
Add floating/bouncing geometric shapes in the background using CSS animations
Add a rotating motivational quotes section on the dashboard
Add all required CSS for animations, clock, shapes, and date picker modal
acceptance_criteria: Clicking 'Mark Complete' in the Question Bank shows a date picker defaulting to today
Selecting a past date and confirming marks the question done with that date
Spaced repetition intervals are calculated from the selected date, not today
Dashboard displays an animated clock with a ticking second hand
Dashboard has subtle floating geometric shapes in neo-brutalism colors
All animations are CSS-based with no external dependencies
verification: Open index.html and verify Mark Complete button shows date picker
Verify dashboard has animated clock and floating shapes
Verify no external URLs or CDN references added
findings: Both features implemented successfully. Date picker uses inline display pattern (shows/hides next to the Done button). The scheduleRevision function now accepts an optional fromDate parameter so intervals are calculated from the selected date. Clock uses setInterval(1000) for second hand. Floating shapes use CSS keyframe animations with pointer-events:none to avoid interaction. Quotes rotate every 8 seconds with a 500ms fade transition. All JS passes node --check. No external URLs introduced.
